message:
fix: implement real builtins instead of stubs

- Fix any()/all() for list literals (no .items access for fixed arrays)
- Forward builtins_mod stubs to real implementations in collections.zig
- Implement real hex(), oct(), bin() functions
- Forward sum, min, max, sorted, reversed, range, enumerate, zip,
  map, filter, chr, ord, pow, round, divmod, hash to real implementations

This ensures `from builtins import X` uses the same code as direct calls.
